component.name: MagpieMusicPlayer
MagpieMusicPlayer
component.summary: A local-first desktop music player with plugin support.
一款支持插件扩展的本地优先桌面音乐播放器。

description.p: MagpieMusicPlayer is a local-first desktop music player with local library management, playlists, configurable caches, lyrics and song info lookup, and a plugin system for user-authorized services.
MagpieMusicPlayer 是一款本地优先的桌面音乐播放器，支持本地音乐管理、播放列表、可配置缓存、歌词与歌曲信息检索，以及面向用户授权服务的插件扩展系统。
